sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ الكُتَّابُ العَرَبُ صُوَرًا بَيَانِيَّةً رَائِعَةً لِوَصْفِ الطَّبِيعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Arapski pisci koriste divne stilske figure za opisivanje prirode.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic writers use wonderful imagery to describe nature.

sentences.arabic: مَثَلًا، يَقُولُ الكَاتِبُ إِنَّ الأَرْضَ تَلْبَسُ ثَوْبًا أَخْضَرَ فِي فَصْلِ الرَّبِيعِ.
sentences.translation: Na primjer, pisac kaže da zemlja oblači zelenu haljinu u proljeće.
sentences.translationEn: For example, a writer says that the earth wears a green dress in the spring.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا التَّعْبِيرُ يَجْعَلُ القَارِئَ يَتَخَيَّلُ جَمَالَ الحُقُولِ وَالأَزْهَارِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj izraz navodi čitaoca da zamisli ljepotu polja i cvijeća.
sentences.translationEn: This expression makes the reader imagine the beauty of fields and flowers.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا يُشَبِّهُ الشُّعَرَاءُ الوَجْهَ الجَمِيلَ بِالقَمَرِ فِي لَيْلَةٍ مُظْلِمَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Također, pjesnici porede lijepo lice s mjesecom u mračnoj noći.
sentences.translationEn: Poets also liken a beautiful face to the moon on a dark night.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الِاسْتِعَارَاتُ تُعْطِي اللُّغَةَ العَرَبِيَّةَ سِحْرًا خَاصًّا.
sentences.translation: Ove metafore daju arapskom jeziku poseban šarm.
sentences.translationEn: These metaphors give the Arabic language a special charm.
